jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at 91Springboard - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
91Springboard, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 91Springboard:
91Springboard is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 91Springboard!
